title: Experience Extra
description: This mod introduces Experience related things!
body:
![All](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b975b85ed22d4660a8e73186e02a0755d71d18c.png) **Experience Extra** is a tiny mod which adds Experience related things!
- You can find Experience Ores below y level 10 and you can find Experience Seeds with Sniffer!
- New Enchantment "**Training**" Added You can attach it to weapons, and it will increase the amount of experience you get by killing mobs!
- And also you can breed Experiencesaurus with any kind of seeds
